message: Jake
Yuriko
Kristy
Serial Murder Case
Oh, you came back, huh?
What's with that way of saying it?
But you called and told me to go to Central Park, didn’t you?
Oh.
Sorry, I’m heading there now.
Wait, did you buy BAM again?
Yeah.
There’s another article about Guy.
I wonder what’s going on.
Well, I have no idea at all.
Ah, speaking of which,
there was a call from San.
Is she your girlfriend?
Nothing in particular.
But she sounded down.
Welcome back, Boss. Did anything interesting happen?
Look.
Talk.
Listen.
Think.
Move.
System.
Surroundings.
Guy's article.
About the murder case.
About Meryl's request.
About that.
About　that.
BAM's matter
About　Gai's　article
The　matter　of
Meryl's request
The matter of
The matter of
Gai's article
To another place
Save
Exit the game
The office is still as simple as ever, in stark contrast to the shabby Chinatown.
However,
today's
I wonder what's going on?
Am I just supposed to keep standing here?
I don't particularly want to stare at the room now, but it’s tough with my view blocked.
Is today just going to be a day of standing?
? That's fine, I guess.
Looking at it this way, I can't tell if it's youthful or mature.
They say women are monsters, huh?
Gai announced the breakup with his ex-fiancée, and it seems he has decided to marry Cindy.
When did that happen?
!? Did the boss know about this?
There's no way he knew such nonsense!
He even went as far as saying that his relationship with his ex was an illusion, and that he wants to nurture true love with 16-year-old
Cindy for life.
Gai's passionate words were matched by his unusually shy pink cheeks.
Gai with pink cheeks? What a striking image.
Absolutely.
But just how much of it is true?
I, Eva Courtney, was assaulted by Gai's ex-fiancée when she barged into the editorial department, but I didn't back down.
When did Gai ever get violent? This is nothing but a ludicrous fabrication!
Did you do something to earn someone's resentment? That's a terrible way to write about someone, huh?
This kind of article,
I hope it hasn't caught your eye.
I, Eva Courtney,
What's this, is this article also about that woman?
in the three cities of San Francisco, Los Angeles, and Detroit,
gruesome
I intend to keep pursuing the arrest of the perpetrator behind them.
Are you the police or something?
Right?
Wow, that's a bold statement!
Sadly, incidents like this are frequent all across the United States. Several months have passed, and many cases have likely faded from memory.
However, this despicable criminal is still somewhere in America,
still alive with parts of the girls' bodies.
Sure, they are dismembering bodies, but what evidence do you have that they’re carrying them around?
No, but it’s possible this perpetrator is carrying them.
I’m convinced these three cases are the work of the same criminal. And I'm certain that this perpetrator, who is currently lying low, will kill again soon.
An act of slaughter, resembling that gruesome and devilish work, will likely happen again somewhere in this great nation.
Is this criminal collecting various parts?
Certainly, thinking about it this way, it suggests that it’s not over yet.
This article seems to be provoking the perpetrator as well.
Ah.
Just thinking about it makes me so angry!
What's wrong, this is rare.
The BAM female reporter, she must enjoy torturing people, no doubt about it!
The boss showing raw emotions is actually just a normal person.
What are you so impressed by when looking at someone’s face?
Because, the Boss is so cool that it's hard to know what he's thinking usually.
You know, I actually had my suspicions that the Boss might be involved with the mafia.
Why do I...?
Because he always has this pretty cold look when he sits down. It's like you can't tell what he's thinking.
That's probably just his face when he's feeling down and has no work.
Well, that's fine, I guess.
But what’s up with this magazine? If it’s not going well with Guy and
San, now it's Cindy?
Don't tell me!
Alright, let’s get to work today too, right?
Boss.
I get that you feel sulky, but why not go visit Anna’s place?
I feel like she won't be there even if we go now.
No way, she will be!
How can you say that so confidently?
My intuition never lies!
I just went earlier and she wasn't there.
Why not give it another shot?
Thinking it's someone else's problem.
I don’t want to wear down my shoes.
It's such a poor vibe.
Right?
Say what you want, but I dislike wasting steps.
Tsk tsk.
You have to go to a place 100 times, Boss.
A hundred times? What’s that?
It’s a Japanese proverb that says you need to visit a place 100 times to gather information.
Lately, things have been pretty busy, right?
By the way, haven't you been able to meet Anna Skakki yet?
You know,
Didn’t you see the results up till yesterday?
Ugh, I've been staking out all night!
You won't be able to do it without the motivation, you know!
If that's the case,
why not give it a try?
Oh, I can't do that! Lack of sleep is my skin's worst enemy, so I can't do something like that.
We haven't heard from Meryl since then.
It'd be a problem even if we did hear from her. We still don't know anything.
That's true.
By the way, do you know Meryl's contact information?
Didn't you ask?
Oh, I haven't heard anything.
What a bother, what should I do?
I suppose you could say it’s lucky in a way.
I hope you can meet Anna soon.
What do you think about this incident?
I really hate these kinds of incidents. It feels like they’re just hurting those weaker than themselves.
Yeah.
I absolutely despise cowardly people like that!
I think the criminal should be caught quickly and face the death penalty.
Don’t just toss around the death penalty so lightly. They might be out of their minds.
Only someone who’s out of their mind would do something like this.
Anyway, I just can't forgive this criminal!
On the phone,
they seemed a bit down and on the verge of tears.
Really?
Aren't you needed, Boss?
It's not me she needs, it's Guy.
Do you really think so?
Speaking of which,
have you met ?
No, we just parted ways at the magazine company. Why?
Why do you ask?
I feel sorry for .
is sad.
Why?
Because when someone is shocked and feeling down, not even offering a kind word is just too much.
Don't you think that's a really cold attitude?
You know,
her boyfriend is Guy, right?
But he was her ex-boyfriend, wasn't he?
I can't even take care of my exes.
Eh?
Ugh!
Oh, right! You're cold to the ones who dumped you.
Listen,
that's not it; it's about the case article with Guy.
It's a problem, right? It's not something for others to meddle in.
Uh.
Ugh, somehow.
That's pretty harsh, huh.
She has always been strong-willed. If you care too much, they'll look down on you. When she wants help, she'll call out herself.
Is that really how it is?
Are you okay, San?
Even the editor BAM is wicked, huh?
Hehe.
So, what has that female reporter done to you?
That Eva, with snake-like eyes, was staring at my whole body, licking her lips as she spoke.
Because.
This can't be a joke, right?!
A nude model?!
Oh, there was a page like that in BAM's gravure.
That’s great, that woman reporter must have liked it. But being a dedicated nude model is also scary. Hehe.
It's not a laughing matter, it's like sexual harassment.
That's a bit over the top.
Hmm.
The Boss is surprisingly a nice guy, so isn’t it possible? Making money as a model is also a good way since he can't earn as a detective.
Cindy is still 16, right? So, getting married is quite a shock.
Why are we even talking about this?
They say where there's smoke, there's fire, but the guy who wrote the article seems oddly confident.
Is there a solid news source backing this up?
There's no way he can just say it was nonsense after stating it so firmly, right?
Yeah, that's true. But why are we discussing this?
It really makes me wonder.
What's going to happen to those two?
This kid is quick with information and seems silly but can be sharp too.
Not someone to underestimate.
The truth is,
I feel like she would be more suited to being a detective.
I still haven't been able to see Anna Skakki. I heard about her daughter's funeral, but where was it held?
It’s been a week since then, but how long does the sadness of losing a family member take to heal?
Will I be overcome with deep sorrow when my family dies?
Unfortunately, I have no confidence.
Anyway, no progress can be made without getting her story, no matter what situation Anna Skakki is in.
I feel bad for her, but I want to move things along quickly. Is that my ego talking?
Anyway, no progress can be made without getting her story, no matter what situation Anna Skakki is in.
The article for BAM is written by Eva. She might know the details about this case.
The criminal probably has some purpose in cutting up the body.
Or, could it be that the aim is actually to collect only the beautiful parts of that person for no reason at all?
I really hope this case gets resolved quickly.
After all, it's their problem. I might not need to worry about it.
If I start to doubt, there’s no end to it.
I wonder if meeting Guy would solve the mystery?
He seemed to be hiding something from me.
He came over eagerly and took me out, which was fine, but his attitude felt overly theatrical.
But, did I really love him that much?
I wonder if I loved you?
When I was told that I would marry Guy, I was a little shaken.
I thought I didn't care about the past, but maybe there's some damage left deep down.
I was rejected in my student days.
was dumped.
She, Guy, and I were close friends from school. It became an unspoken understanding that we did everything together as a trio.
And,
while dating me, she was also dating Guy.
I found out the truth about that much later, and Guy didn't even know that I was with her.
didn't even know they were dating.
After our breakup, was it true love with Cindy?
What on earth is going on? I have no idea why gossip about Guy is being written at this time.
Who on earth is Eva's news source?
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
